languages.text: {n}Старый офицер улыбается и низко кланяется вам. Юноша за его спиной бросает на Мартинакса презрительный взгляд и, задрав подбородок, проходит к освободившимся местам.{/n}
{n}The old officer smiles and bows low to you. The young man behind him casts a sneering look at Martinax and walks to the vacated spaces with his nose in the air.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Старый офицер улыбается и низко кланяется вам. Юноша за его спиной бросает на Мартинакса презрительный взгляд и, задрав подбородок, проходит к освободившимся местам.{/n}

{n}The old officer smiles and bows low to you. The young man behind him casts a sneering look at Martinax and walks to the vacated beds with his nose in the air.{/n}
{n}The old officer smiles and bows low to you. The young man behind him casts a sneering look at Martinax and walks to the vacated beds with his nose in the air.{/n}

languages.text: {n}老兵は微笑み、深く頭を下げた。その背後では若い男がマルティナクスを嘲笑うように見て、鼻を高くして空いたベッドへと歩み寄る。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The old officer smiles and bows low to you. The young man behind him casts a sneering look at Martinax and walks to the vacated beds with his nose in the air.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Yaşlı subay, gülümseyip önünde eğiliyor. Arkasındaki genç adam, Martinax'a alaycı bir bakış atıyor ve burnu havada bir hâlde boşalan alanlara doğru yürüyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The old officer smiles and bows low to you. The young man behind him casts a sneering look at Martinax and walks to the vacated spaces with his nose in the air.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Yaşlı subay, gülümseyip önünde eğiliyor. Arkasındaki genç adam, Martinax'a alaycı bir bakış atıyor ve burnu havada bir hâlde boşalan alanlara doğru yürüyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}年长的军官露出微笑，向你深深鞠躬。他身后的年轻人朝马丁纳克斯投去讥讽的一瞥，随后趾高气扬地走向空出的床位。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The old officer smiles and bows low to you. The young man behind him casts a sneering look at Martinax and walks to the vacated spaces with his nose in the air.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}年长的军官露出微笑，向你深深鞠躬。他身后的年轻人朝马丁纳克斯投去讥讽的一瞥，随后趾高气扬地走向空出的床位。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Der alte Offizier lächelt und macht eine tiefe Verbeugung. Der junge Mann hinter ihm wirf Martinax einen spöttischen Blick zu und schlendert erhobenen Hauptes zu den jetzt leeren Abteilen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The old officer smiles and bows low to you. The young man behind him casts a sneering look at Martinax and walks to the vacated spaces with his nose in the air.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Der alte Offizier lächelt und macht eine tiefe Verbeugung. Der junge Mann hinter ihm wirf Martinax einen spöttischen Blick zu und schlendert erhobenen Hauptes zu den jetzt leeren Abteilen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le vieil officier vous adresse un sourire assorti d'une profonde révérence. Derrière lui, le jeune homme jette un regard narquois à Martinax avant de se diriger vers les places ainsi libérées en redressant fièrement le menton.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The old officer smiles and bows low to you. The young man behind him casts a sneering look at Martinax and walks to the vacated spaces with his nose in the air.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le vieil officier vous adresse un sourire assorti d'une profonde révérence. Derrière lui, le jeune homme jette un regard narquois à Martinax avant de se diriger vers les places ainsi libérées en redressant fièrement le menton.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El viejo oficial sonríe y te hace una reverencia profunda. El joven que tiene detrás lanza una mirada desdeñosa a Martinax y se dirige al espacio vacío con aire altivo.{/n}
